title: EDUCATION - 211info
text: SCIENCEWORKS HANDS-ON MUSEUM EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers after school programs, summer and school-year camps, field trips, and outreach visits on topics such as engineering design, scientific inquiry, and natural history. 1500 E Main Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Camp Scholarships: Family has EBT (Oregon Trail Card), SNAP, or WIC Hours: Varies Email (541) 482-6767 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 482-6767 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by program. Memberships available. Scholarship assistance is available for low-income families and is awarded based on need and application date, as funding allows DOCUMENTS: For camp scholarships: Official documentation reflecting current EBT (Oregon Trail Card), SNAP, or WIC assistance AREA SERVED: Curry, Douglas, Jackson, Josephine, Klamath, and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at E Main and Campus Way. Take exit 14 and head west on Ashland Street for 1 mile to Walker Avenue. Turn right on Walker and proceed until it ends at E Main. Turn left; the first left is Campus Way. Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: ARTS AND CULTURE - MUSEUM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SCIENCEWORKS HANDS-ON MUSEUM
